hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd=$(jq -r .tool_input.command); if [[ "$cmd" == *"app/"* || "$PWD" == *"/app" ]] && [[ "$cmd" =~ (^|[[:space:]]|&&|;|\|)(npm|pnpm|yarn)([[:space:]]|$) ]]; then echo "BLOCKED: app/ 는 Bun 사용 — npm/pnpm/yarn 금지 (Golden Rule #tooling)" >&2; exit 2; fi; if [[ "$cmd" == *"server/"* || "$PWD" == *"/server" ]] && [[ "$cmd" =~ (^|[[:space:]]|&&|;|\|)bun([[:space:]]|$) ]]; then echo "BLOCKED: server/ 는 npm 사용 — bun 금지 (Golden Rule #tooling)" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'
